description: A part has failed a quality inspection. A quality engineer needs to create a Non-Conformance Report (NCR).

nodes.task_description: Start a new NCR and link it to the specific part, work order, and inspection result.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a new NCR and links the relevant records.

nodes.task_description: Describe the defect in detail, attach evidence (photos, measurements), and assign a defect code.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a clear description of the issue and attaches supporting files.

nodes.task_description: Route the NCR to the Material Review Board (MRB) for disposition.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent submits the NCR, and it appears in the queue for the MRB team.
